events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, the legendary guitarist and songwriter for Queen, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! His incredible guitar work has inspired generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger! Still strutting, still singing, still the ultimate rock star.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Changing the Music Landscape
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV arrived and changed everything. From 'Video Killed The Radio Star' to global phenomenon, it truly redefined how we experienced music.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. The album that launched a thousand singalongs and defined a generation. Pure Britpop brilliance.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring dozens of iconic acts.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly unforgettable moment in time.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His legacy continues to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur being shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in a drive-by on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, passing away six days later; he would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation, on the anniversary of the tragic shooting that led to his passing. His impact remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Jimi Hendrix, a true guitar god who would have been 84. His innovative sound continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs – still absolutely timeless.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive lead singer and songwriter of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude remain unmistakable.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the outspoken and iconic frontman of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single re-released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, four years after its initial US single release.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single was re-released in the UK. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: First iPod announced 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple announced the device that changed personal music forever. A true game-changer.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007, an enduring icon of British cinema.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles and an influential solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.
